rationale: Foreign LLP's legal name in its home jurisdiction. Foreign-correction analog to LLP_MLLP-17's `entity.name` — uses entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention.

label_verbatim: a partnership organized under the laws of the jurisdiction of ____, and authorized to do business in Maine
rationale: State or country of organization. Same key family as LLC_MLLC-12 / CORP_MBCA-12 foreign-qualification forms.

label_verbatim: FIRST: On ____ (date) the Secretary of State filed a document delivered for filing by the undersigned foreign limited liability partnership entitled:
rationale: Date the original (incorrect) document was filed. Same key as LLP_MLLP-17.

label_verbatim: partnership entitled: ____ (i.e. Application for Authority to do Business, Assumed Name, etc.)
rationale: Title/type of the original document being corrected (e.g., Application for Authority, Assumed Name). Same key as LLP_MLLP-17 schema_gap; on this template it IS bound to a widget (unlike LLP_MLLP-17 where the analogous blank has no AcroForm widget — upstream template difference).

label_verbatim: THIRD: The inaccuracy or defect to be corrected is described as follows:
rationale: Large multi-line text box (rect ~121pt high) for free-text description of the inaccuracy or defect (THIRD recital). Same key as LLP_MLLP-17.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The portion of the said document to be corrected is corrected to read in its entirety as follows:
rationale: Large multi-line text box (rect ~113pt high) for the corrected text replacing the defective portion (FOURTH recital). Same key as LLP_MLLP-17.

label_verbatim: Partner(s)* ... (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget for individual-partner signature. Shape D (matching LLP_MLLP-17, CORP_MBCA-11, LLC_MLLC-12). The (signature) line above is wet-ink only and has no AcroForm widget.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s) which are Entities — Name of Entity
rationale: Name of the entity-partner when the signer is a corporate/LLC partner rather than a natural person. Parallel block to the individual-partner block above. Same key family as LLP_MLLP-17, GP_MPA-1, LP_MLPA-6's `general_partner_entity_N.name`.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s) which are Entities — By ____ (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of the entity-partner. Same primitive as LLP_MLLP-17.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1; universal handle for entity name on this filing.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
